title: Colored Fish Buckets
description: Unique textures for tropical fish buckets
body:
Tropical fish bucket item will now have unique texture dependance on its colors and pattern\
(Axolotls also included)

Works on new vanilla features [25w03a (1.21.5) or newer]\
No Optifine Required

![Screenshot of some fish buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba6272d415a6f0fb61d5771c5cf83ff9d81c02de.png)

Plans for future updates:
- Buckets will have a fake durability bar in gui as a health indicator.
- Axolotls will have baby bucket variant (textures are already in files, but they are unused cuz it works incorrectly)
